1. At a glance 2. Naming & spelling 3. Logo 4. Color 5. Typography 6. Motifs 7. Imagery 8. Voice & tone 9. Islamic standards 10. Applications 11. Asset index

01Brand at a glance

SoCal Academy of Knowledge (SoCal AoK) is a prestigious, academically serious Islamic institution in Northridge, California. It teaches the Qur'an, the authentic Sunnah, and essential life and academic skills — from the Evening Maktab and Weekend School to vocational and youth programs, and its two differentiators: a full-time Hifz program and a K-12 Homeschool Academic Support program no other valley institution offers at this level.

Personality

Prestigious and academic, yet warm. Scholarly without being distant; trustworthy and rooted in tradition; welcoming to families of every background.

Brand pillars

  • Faith — grounded in the Qur'an and authentic Sunnah.
  • Knowledge — rigorous, structured learning, symbolized by the pen.
  • Character — adab, integrity (Amanah), and excellence (Ihsan).
  • Community — a supportive Ummah for students and families.

Promise

Nurturing Faith & Knowledge.

02Naming & spelling standards

Consistency here is the fastest credibility win.

Use thisNot thisNote
SoCal Academy of KnowledgeSocal Academy / SCAKFull legal name
SoCal AoKSOCAL AOKShort form; keep the casing S, C, AoK
socalaok.org · info@socalaok.orgInfo@SoCalAoK.orgLowercase URLs & emails
MaktabMaktubEvening Qur'an program
NazraNazarahScholar-verified spelling
K-12 Homeschool Academic Support ProgramFull-Time Academic ProgramAcademic support for homeschoolers — not full provision
Qur'an, Hifz, Tajweed, Aqeedah, SeerahQuran / Hafiz (program)Consistent Islamic terminology

03Logo

The logo is a wordmark-and-emblem: a dynamic elliptical orbit encircling the name, with a fountain pen (qalam) standing at the lower-left, its tail flowing into the orbit. The pen signifies scholarship and the written word; the orbit signifies the continuous pursuit of knowledge and excellence.

Versions

  • Primary (full color): forest-green lettering, metallic-gold orbit, rule, and pen trim, on white or parchment. Master files are vector (SVG / EPS / PDF) plus high-resolution PNG.
  • One-color / black: the board-approved black artwork for one-color print, stamps, fax, and embroidery.
  • Small sizes: the full art includes a dimensional (3D) pen; for favicon/embroidery use the simplified mark.

Clear space & minimum size

  • Keep clear space on all sides at least the height of the cap letters in “AoK.”
  • Minimum width ~140px / 36mm so the subline and pen stay legible; below that, use the simplified mark.

Misuse — never

  • Recolor outside the palette or change the green/gold relationship.
  • Stretch, condense, rotate, or rearrange the pen, orbit, and wordmark.
  • Place the color logo on a busy photo or low-contrast field without a white/parchment plate.
  • Re-typeset the wordmark in another font — the lettering is fixed artwork.

04Color palette

Forest green and gold are primary; navy is a supporting accent; parchment is an alternate background to white.

Forest GreenHEX #005418RGB 0·84·24Primary — text, headings
AoK GoldHEX #E4A800RGB 228·168·0Primary accent — orbit, rules, CTAs
Gold DeepHEX #B47800RGB 180·120·0Gold shadow / secondary
Midnight NavyHEX #15263FRGB 21·38·63Supporting accent
ParchmentHEX #F6F1E4RGB 246·241·228Alternate background

Green dominates; gold is the precious accent (keep to ~10–15% of a layout); navy for occasional depth; white or parchment as the field. Maintain WCAG AA contrast — never set body copy in gold on white.

05Typography

The official typefaces are Playfair Display (display) and Inter (body). Both are royalty-free under the SIL Open Font License and already load on socalaok.org. The logo wordmark is fixed artwork in a classic serif; all other headings use Playfair Display.

Playfair Display

Display & headings · weights 600–800.

Inter

Body & UI · weights 400–600.

Arabic: دار العلم and the Bismillah are set in Amiri.

06Motifs & iconography

Two motifs carry the brand. Use them as they appear in the logo — do not redraw or recombine them arbitrarily.

  • The pen (qalam) — scholarship, the written word, and the Islamic honor of knowledge (“By the pen and what they inscribe”).
  • The orbit (ellipse) — the continuous pursuit of knowledge and excellence; momentum and aspiration.

A thin gold rule (as under the wordmark) may be used as a divider. Avoid clip-art, photographic icons, or competing symbols.

07Imagery & photography

  • Warm, natural light; authentic moments of students and teachers learning — not staged stock.
  • Respect modesty norms and the privacy of minors; obtain consent before publishing any child's image.
  • Favor compositions that harmonize with green and gold; avoid clashing or oversaturated tones.

08Voice & tone

Prestigious yet warm; scholarly but accessible; confident without boasting. Lead with the benefit to the child and family, and use Islamic terminology correctly and respectfully.

Do
  • “A structured Hifz path guided by qualified, caring instructors.”
  • “Nurturing faith, character, and academic excellence.”
  • Address parents' real questions plainly.
Don't
  • “The best Islamic school in California, guaranteed.”
  • Jargon, hype, or fear-based messaging.
  • Overuse exclamation points or buzzwords.

09Islamic standards & adab

The new logo is iconographically secular (pen and orbit). The academy's Islamic identity is carried through the Bismillah and the Arabic name as on-brand elements — not inside the logo.

﷽
  • Bismillah: use it as a header/banner element on the website and letterhead, set with the Unicode ligature (U+FDFD) in Amiri — adequate size, never stretched or cropped.
  • Arabic name: the academy's Arabic name is دار العلم (Dar al-ʼIlm). Use it on the website header and letterhead in Amiri.
  • Credibility: present teacher credentials and ijazah where possible.

10Applications

SurfaceGuidance
Website headerFull-color logo on white; Bismillah banner above the nav.
Letterhead / documentsFull-color logo top; Bismillah header; gold rule; green/gold footer.
FlyersUnify to green + gold + this type; gold as accent only.
Social avatarSimplified app-icon mark (the full logo is too wide for a circle).
SignageFull-color logo; mind minimum size and clear space.
Certificates / ijazahUse the circular Seal (shown right) in green + gold.

11Asset index

The full asset set is maintained in the project's Brand Assets folder:

  • Logo — full color: SVG, EPS, PDF (vector) + transparent & white PNG
  • One-color / black version (board-approved)
  • Favicon & app icon (simplified mark)
  • Certificate seal — green + gold
  • Color reference strip
  • Templates — web header, letterhead, Bismillah element (HTML)
  • This document as PDF (top of page)

Version 2.0 supersedes the earlier Mihrab Crest, now retired and archived.
